title: python-virt-firmware bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[25.7.3-1.0.1]
- Hide redhat reference in python-virt-firmware [Orabug: 36562018]

[25.7.3-1]
- update to bugfix release 25.7.3

[25.7.2-1]
- update to bugfix release 25.7.2

[25.7-1]
- update to 25.7, switch to pyproject rpm macros

[25.4.1-1]
- rebase to version 25.4.1

[25.3-2]
- specfile: do not use %{_libdir}

[25.3-1]
- rebase to 25.3, split virt-sb-certs sub-rpm
full_text:
[25.7.3-1.0.1]
- Hide redhat reference in python-virt-firmware [Orabug: 36562018]

[25.7.3-1]
- update to bugfix release 25.7.3

[25.7.2-1]
- update to bugfix release 25.7.2

[25.7-1]
- update to 25.7, switch to pyproject rpm macros

[25.4.1-1]
- rebase to version 25.4.1

[25.3-2]
- specfile: do not use %{_libdir}

[25.3-1]
- rebase to 25.3, split virt-sb-certs sub-rpm

References:
